summary: Document Processor Plugin Architecture testing completed successfully. 22/22 backend tests passed. All processor functionality working: registry returns 3 processors sorted by priority (FreightInvoice=100, BillOfLading=105, CustomsEntry=110), test-detect correctly identifies document types, extraction works for all fields (BOL, shipment, carrier, invoice, freight_amount, PO for freight; entry_number, broker_file_number for customs; bol_number, carrier, shipper for BOL), generic text returns matched=false, suggested_references have correct format (label, value, source='processor'), suggested_vendor returns carrier/broker names. Frontend MatchingDebugPanel properly displays processor badges when processor_name is present in diagnostics.
critical_code_review_comments: Processor base class properly defines abstract methods detect() and extract() with optional suggest_vendor() and suggest_references()
Registry correctly sorts processors by priority and iterates through them for detection
Each processor has well-defined regex patterns for field extraction
suggest_references() correctly formats output with label, value, source='processor'
MatchingDebugPanel.js lines 136-145 properly display processor badges when v2_signals.processor_name exists
seed_data_creation: None required - used test data provided by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Processor Plugin Architecture is fully functional. Three processors registered (FreightInvoice, BillOfLading, CustomsEntry). POST /api/processors/test-detect works with all document types. GET /api/processors/registry returns sorted list. GET /api/processors/document/{doc_id}/processor-result returns processor info for documents. Frontend processor badges display in MatchingDebugPanel when v2_signals.processor_name exists in diagnostics.

Part 1-2 - Registry.GET /api/processors/registry: PASS - Returns 3 processors sorted by priority (100, 105, 110)

Part 3-4 - Freight Detection.Extracted fields: PASS - bol_number=89268460, shipment_number=111428, carrier=Tumalo Creek Transport, invoice_number=INV-0303853, freight_amount=1250, po_number=PO-55432

Part 3-4 - BOL Detection.Extracted fields: PASS - bol_number=BOL-98765432, carrier=XPO Logistics, shipper=Pacific Coast Paper

Part 5 - Suggested References.Freight references format: PASS - Each ref has label, value, source='processor'
Part 5 - Suggested References.Customs references format: PASS - Each ref has label, value, source='processor'
Part 5 - Suggested References.BOL references format: PASS - Each ref has label, value, source='processor'

Part 6 - Suggested Vendor.BOL vendor: PASS - Returns 'XPO Logistics' or 'Pacific Coast Paper' (carrier/shipper)
